bf33a871-fbcc-4645-92c0-11007fd6ff4a.text:
NovaChem Industries Pvt. Ltd.
Industry: Chemical Manufacturing
Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
Employees: ~350
Production Capacity: 250 Tons/day
Products
Industrial Solvents
Cleaning Chemicals
Industrial Lubricants
Process Additives
Departments
Operations
Maintenance
Inspection
Quality Assurance
Safety (EHS)
Utilities
IT & Document Control
Major Equipment
Chemical Reactor (R-101)
Feed & Transfer Pumps (P-101, P-102)
Heat Exchanger (HE-101)
Steam Boiler (B-101)
Air Compressor (C-101)
Cooling Tower (CT-101)
Storage Tanks (T-101, T-102)
Pressure Filter (F-101)
Safety & Quality Standards
The plant follows ISO 9001 quality management practices, ISO 14001 environmental management principles, and standard industrial EHS procedures. Preventive maintenance, scheduled inspections, SOP compliance, and incident reporting are integral parts of plant operations.
Purpose of this Repository
This fictional company profile has been created for an AI-powered Industrial Knowledge Intelligence prototype. All documents, maintenance records, inspections, SOPs, emails, and reports in the dataset are designed to simulate a realistic industrial document ecosystem for demonstrating document ingestion, knowledge graph construction, RAG-based question answering, maintenance intelligence, and compliance workflows.

cac208fd-d898-439b-9c21-3301e4ad5152.text:
NovaChem Production Process
Raw materials stored in T-101.
P-101 pumps material to HE-101.
HE-101 heats/cools the process.
R-101 performs the reaction.
M-101 mixes the chemicals.
F-101 filters impurities.
T-102 stores finished product.
Boiler, Cooling Tower and Compressor support the process.
